sll $0,$0,0
#initialize
addi $0,$0,0x0000
addi $1,$0,0x0005
addi $2,$0,0xFFFF

# bgezal test: $1 = 5 > 0, should branch and link
bgezal $1,TARGET1
addi $3,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET1:
addi $4,$31,0x0000

# Test bgezal with negative value (should not branch)
addi $5,$0,0xFFFB
bgezal $5,TARGET2
addi $6,$0,0x0001
j TARGET3
TARGET2:
addi $6,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET3:

# Test bgezal with zero (should branch)
addi $7,$0,0x0000
bgezal $7,TARGET4
addi $8,$0,0xFFFF
TARGET4:
addi $9,$31,0x0000

halt
